name: cashsnap_two_stage_balanced_real_p24_trueempty_proposal_gate_browser_stack_rej080_usdhi_det50

evidence.summary: Balanced real p24 detector plus true-empty gate with base reject>=0.80, but USD_50/USD_100 proposals with detector confidence >=0.50 use reject>=0.99. Versus the older reject>=0.99 point, full exact-value improves 1209 -> 1235, background-FP images improve 79 -> 58, mean USD/KHR absolute value errors improve 7.70/1523 -> 6.99/1302, while object recall drops 0.9486 -> 0.9425. Versus plain reject>=0.80, it recovers four billsbank high-value USD exact losses and gives +3 exact-value net with the same background-FP count. Strict-clean remains 668 exact-value and 10 background-FP images.

known_limits: Diagnostic stack only; not production-ready and not overlap/fan/hand capable.
This is a class-aware fusion policy, not a new detector model; browser/app code must implement the class override fields exactly.
The policy introduces one full-test exact loss on usd_total and three weighted-worse usd_total rows versus plain reject>=0.80.
Full real val/test still contains mixed-source, empty-label, KHR_100, and cross-split issues documented in real_data_label_audit_v1.
Current 13-class schema cannot encode KHR_100 or other out-of-scope banknotes.
The gate rejects proposals but does not correct denomination classes.
